Welcome to AsterMotion

Aster.motion is an open-source web component library. Copy, paste, and edit the components or the design system for your own web projects. Designed and coded by Miko.CST.

Component Showcase

Real layouts built with the AsterMotion component library.

Example

Settings

Tabs, inputs, switches, radio group, and a modal composed into a settings page.

  • Settings

Manage your profile, plan, and notification preferences.

Notifications

Danger zone

Review changes before they're applied to your account.

Pricing

Cards, badges, and a radio group composed into a billing page.

Choose your plan

Simple pricing that scales with your team.

Free

For individuals getting started.

$0/mo

Pro

Popular

For growing teams that need more.

$19/mo

Team

Advanced controls and priority support.

$49/mo
